title: lippia ferruginea
intro: Lippia ferruginea, also known as ironwort or rusty lippia, is a plant species belonging to the family Verbenaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and combat infections. The health benefits of Lippia ferruginea include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive problems and skin conditions. Lippia ferruginea can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various ailments.
